title: switch
subtitle: Many options to choose from
goal: Learn to use switch to select one option from many.
explanation: switch is used when there are many possible values.
Each option is described with a case.
JavaScript looks for a case that matches the value.
When a match is found, the corresponding code runs.
switch often makes code clearer than a long chain of if...else statements.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a drinks menu. You choose one item, and the bartender prepares that specific order.

remember: switch compares a value with each case.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners often forget break. The code may then continue running the following cases.
